name: The Old Wyrm
flavor: Realms at War — a co-op boss for the Missions style of play. Both houses must set aside their feud and bring it down before it razes the great hall. Armour/Vigour tuned above the player curve for a boss.
target: The Wyrm's eye on the miniature; used for line-of-sight and range to it.

attack.name: Wrath of the Wyrm
attack.summary: Every Threats' turn: place 1 Wound on all valid targets (raking claws), then 1 Wound on all Warriors in play whether valid targets or not (sweeping tail). Each Lightning rolled in the collective attack adds 1 more Wound to each valid target.

effects.text: Claws: 1 Wound on all valid targets.
Tail sweep: 1 Wound on all Warriors in play.

superSpecialAbility.summary: Inferno: on 3+ Lightning in the collective Threat attack, the Wyrm breathes fire — place 2 Wounds on every Warrior in play.
